flags.message: The provisioned snapshot is a bare bulk-import docket: no docket entries, no dates, no docket number, no originating-court information, and no petition documents. The only case-specific signals are the caption 'Mason v. Rollins' and one opinion cluster (88494), which points to a nineteenth-century merits case decided in the writ-of-error era — there was no discretionary petition stage to predict. The prediction rests on corpus base rates for this population of sparse opinion-import SCOTUS dockets rather than on any petition-stage facts.
